services.name: Browserbase
services.description: Headless browser sessions, web search, and page fetching for AI agents.

services.name: Agoragentic
services.description: AI agent service marketplace with pay-per-use invocations via HTTP 402. Browse catalog and invoke services without registration.

services.name: Kurier
services.description: Submit zero-knowledge proofs for on-chain verification via zkVerify. Supports multiple proof types including groth16, plonky2, risc0, fflonk, ultraplonk, sp1, ultrahonk, and ezkl.

services.name: Run402
services.description: Full-stack infrastructure for AI agents: Postgres database + REST API + user auth + file storage + RLS + static site hosting + image generation. Prototype tier is FREE.
